summary: The Benchmark page's last visible English labels (Collected/Selected → Собрано/Отобрано in BenchmarkTable.tsx) are translated, and the error strings on the routes the Benchmark flow actually hits (benchmark, analyze, jobs) are now Russian, matching the existing translation precedent. The diff is pure string-literal replacement with no logic, control-flow, or type changes; typecheck and production build both pass. The favorites/feedback/[id] route translations reach slightly beyond the strict Benchmark page, but they are user-facing error-message translations consistent with the broader Russian-localization epic and were explicitly enumerated and approved in the plan, so this reads as planned breadth rather than unrelated scope creep. Machine-facing values (HTTP statuses, JSON keys, env-var names, enum values like not_found, mode identifiers) are correctly left in English.
